theme: 一排 niche coffee cups，为什么比咖啡豆更像一个人的审美简历

items.title: 晨光柜格第一排
items.description: 很多人的杯子不是器皿而已，更像一排替自己发言的审美标签。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, a first row of niche specialty coffee cups displayed in square cabinet shelves under soft morning light, varied glazes and unusual handles, collector atmosphere, highly aesthetic but realistic Xiaohongshu-style interior, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 手冲台边的异形杯耳
items.description: 杯耳的弧度有时候比豆种和风味表更先说明主人的偏好。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, close-up of an unusual handmade coffee cup handle beside a pour-over station, kettle steam, dripper shadows, tactile ceramic details, intimate collector realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 咖啡馆桌上的今日轮换杯
items.description: 有些人每天换一只杯子，就像在替今天挑一个更合适的情绪壳。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, specialty cafe table with today's selected handcrafted coffee cup, espresso spoon, receipt tucked away, fashionable hands adjusting the scene, realistic Xiaohongshu save-worthy composition, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 釉色试排工作台
items.description: 一只杯子的高级感，往往先来自釉色之间那种很难说清的克制关系。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, worktable where several ceramic coffee cups are arranged by glaze tone for comparison, muted earthy palette, notebook and cloth nearby, design-minded still life, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 包里露出的随身杯口
items.description: 真正像人格外延的小物，通常不是拍给别人看的，而是自己每天都要带出门。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, commuter tote bag slightly open with a beautiful niche coffee tumbler and ceramic cup sleeve peeking out, subway station light, stylish urban realism, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 洗杯池边的薄胎白杯
items.description: 杯子被洗干净倒扣着的时候，反而最像一种认真过日子的证据。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, thin white handcrafted coffee cup drying upside down beside a sink after use, water droplets, soft kitchen light, minimal but lived-in domestic beauty, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 朋友来访时的三杯并排
items.description: 杯子一并排，人与人之间的关系也突然变得可以被看见。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, three distinct niche coffee cups lined up on a low table when friends visit, half-finished coffee, dessert crumbs, warm apartment conversation atmosphere, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 店主擦拭陈列杯架
items.description: 有些咖啡店最打动人的不是菜单，而是老板怎么对待那排杯子。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, cafe owner carefully wiping a display shelf full of beautiful specialty coffee cups, afternoon side light, tactile ceramics, tasteful small-business intimacy, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 拍照前调位置的手
items.description: 会买 niche cup 的人，很多时候也会认真决定它该从哪个角度被记住。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, elegant hands adjusting the angle of a niche coffee cup before taking a photo, phone camera nearby, window shadow, save-and-share lifestyle mood, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 办公桌角落的午后浓缩杯
items.description: 有些人带去工位的不是咖啡，是一种不想把日子过糙的证据。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, compact espresso cup on a creative office desk corner in the afternoon, keyboard, notebook, sunlight patch, refined workday ritual, realistic and stylish, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 旅行箱里包好的爱杯
items.description: 会把杯子带去旅行的人，通常不是在带器物，而是在带一个熟悉的自己。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, favorite niche coffee cup carefully wrapped in cloth inside an open suitcase before travel, surrounding clothes and notebook, personal ritual and tenderness, no logos, no readable text.

items.title: 夜里柜灯亮着的最后一格
items.description: 灯一亮，杯子的陈列就不只是收纳，更像一个人给自己留的微型展厅。
items.prompt: Horizontal documentary editorial photograph, last illuminated shelf at night with one especially beloved niche coffee cup glowing in a cabinet, moody apartment darkness around it, intimate collector scene, no logos, no readable text.
